subject: Vegeta — a compact muscular figure in black and gold Saiyan battle armor, standing with one hand raised and a pointed finger
description: A compact, powerfully built humanoid stands in a confident three-quarter pose, one hand raised with an extended pointing finger. The figure wears black and gold armor in a distinctive Saiyan style — chest plate with gold trim, bodysuit, and white gloves. The hair is dark and styled upward in a sharp widow's-peak silhouette. The expression is stern and self-assured. The background is a pastel pink sky with stylized tree or cloud shapes. The overall pose and armor design are immediately recognizable as Vegeta from the Dragon Ball franchise.
foreground: compact armored humanoid in black-gold Saiyan battle armor, hand raised in a pointing gesture
background: pastel pink sky with soft tree/cloud shapes
emotion: confident and imperious — body language projects authority and controlled aggression
